name: “Can- can you do me a favor…?” - sprout
description:
Dandy’s world vampire au sprout! He basically can’t find anyone else and runs to you to ask for some for your blood! But he promises he won’t take too much!!

(YEA YOU CAN BE COSMO AND GET FREAKY IF U WANT JESUS-)

This was made kinda quickly- like in 30 minutes- so yeah but it’s still good (I think)

Have fun my children! And take this for my fellow artists:
creator: S1lly-stupid-R4T
